titleStmt.title: SII 40.35: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 35. (A.R. No. B. 14 of 1930.) Duvva, Tanuku Taluk, West Godavari District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a pillar in the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine of the Vēṇugōpalasvāmi temple in the village.

States that 6 puṭṭi of land was the īnāmu given to the Vaikhānasa Uddaṇḍarāyani Rāmānujasvāmi for conducting the daily worship of the gods Gōpālasvāmi, Kēśavarāya, Pallakēśava and Hanumān at Duvva. Further it mentions that the expenses for other services are being met by the villagers and by the local officials.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgōpālasvāmulakuṁnnukēśavarāyani
kiṁnni pallakēśavulakuṁnnu hanumānulaku
nnu duvvalōnu nityapūjā namaskārālu
naḍipiṁci Aṁduku vaighānusulugā
tama gōtrikulu vudaṁḍayarāni rāmā
nujulu svāmulaku yīnāmu palle Ā
ru puṭla varivittula bhūmi vunnaviyivi gā
ka nityapallekeśāvalakuṁnnu paṁca parvāla
kuṁnnu nityadīpārādhanakuṁnnu nūne ne
laku śe 60 Aruvai śelu 6 telukulavāru pō
sevāru kaḍama bāmulavāru vidā
ṇaṁ vāru kāṁpulu karaṇāluṁnnu sakalavidha kā
yiṁkaryāluṁnnu naḍupuduru .
Digital edition of SII 40.35 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
